final:
module RefModule(
    input wire T,
    input wire EN,
    input wire clk,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (EN) begin
            if (T)
                Q <= ~Q; // Toggle the output
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
